rationale: The two papers are tightly aligned on consumer goal pursuit after progress/subgoal milestones: the citing paper models persistence vs. licensing after subgoal success, while the cited paper provides a stage-contingent mechanism for motivation based on perceived velocity and progress level. Given this conceptual overlap and the citing note’s claim that it extends prior situational/manipulation-based subgoal research, this citation is plausibly theory/mechanism-relevant rather than an incidental mention.
